get.summary: List WGS orders for a patient

get.description: List WGS kits for a patient.

post.summary: Link a WGS kit to a patient
post.description:
Link an existing kit to a patient.

The kit must belong to the account and not already be assigned to a patient.
Use this endpoint when a clinic has bulk-ordered kits and needs to assign
one to a patient.

get.summary: List WGS kits for an account
get.description:
List kits for the account.

If gxgKitId query parameter is provided, returns the kit matching that
external GxG kit ID (for validation purposes). Otherwise returns all kits
for the account.

post.summary: Create an enterprise test order for a patient
post.description:
Create a test order for an enterprise practice patient.

Creates a patient entitlement and triggers consent. After the patient
accepts consent, the test is ordered automatically via the existing
event-driven chain.

post.summary: Create a bulk WGS order for an account
post.description: Create a bulk to-clinic WGS order for an enterprise account.

post.summary: Create a bulk MBx order for an account
post.description: Create a bulk to-clinic MBX order for an enterprise account.

get.summary: List MBx kits for an account
get.description:
List kits for the account.

If barcode query parameter is provided, returns the kit matching that
barcode (for validation purposes). Otherwise returns all kits
for the account.

get.summary: Get an MBx kit by ID
get.description: Get a specific kit by its internal ID.

get.summary: List kits for an MBx order
get.description: List kits for a specific order.

get.summary: List MBx kits for a patient
get.description: List MBX kits for a patient.

post.summary: Link an MBx kit to a patient
post.description:
Link an existing kit to a patient.

The kit is identified by its barcode (visible on the physical kit). The kit
must belong to the account and not already be assigned to a patient. Use this
endpoint when a clinic has bulk-ordered kits and needs to assign one to a
patient.

This triggers the cmbio Person and Sample Metadata flow:
creates the cmbio Person if needed, sets metadata on the kit,
and updates the internal database record.

cmbioMbxSampleId.title: Cmbiombxsampleid
cmbioMbxSampleId.description: The ID of the cmbio MBX sample (generated by us)

cmbioMbxKitId.title: Cmbiombxkitid
cmbioMbxKitId.description: The ID of the kit this specimen was collected into

cmbioMbxOrderId.title: Cmbiombxorderid
cmbioMbxOrderId.description: The ID of the order this sample belongs to

labStatus.description: The lab processing status of the collected specimen

collectionDate.title: Collectiondate
collectionDate.description: The date the specimen was collected from the patient

CmbioMbxSample.title: CmbioMbxSample
CmbioMbxSample.description: A specimen collected from a patient into a kit and returned to the lab. Shipping/logistics for the physical kit live on CmbioMbxKit.

gxgWgsKitId.title: Gxgwgskitid
gxgWgsKitId.description: The ID of the Gene by Gene WGS kit (generated by us)

accountId.title: Accountid
accountId.description: The ID of the account that the kit belongs to

patientId.title: Patientid
patientId.description: The ID of the patient that the kit is for. May be None for `TO_CLINIC` orders

orderId.title: Orderid
orderId.description: The Gene by Gene order ID

kitId.title: Kitid
kitId.description: The kit ID from Gene by Gene

trackingNumber.title: Trackingnumber
trackingNumber.description: The tracking number for the shipment

returnCarrier.title: Returncarrier
returnCarrier.description: The carrier for the return shipment

returnTrackingNumber.title: Returntrackingnumber
returnTrackingNumber.description: The tracking number for the return shipment

errorMessage.title: Errormessage
errorMessage.description: Error message if the order failed

gxgWgsOrderId.title: Gxgwgsorderid
gxgWgsOrderId.description: The ID of the Gene by Gene WGS order

accountId.title: Accountid
accountId.description: The ID of the account that the order belongs to

patientId.title: Patientid
patientId.description: The ID of the patient that the order is for (will only be populated for `TO_PATIENT` orders)

orderId.title: Orderid
orderId.description: The Gene by Gene order ID. None while the order is pending (i.e. the row has been written to our DB but the GxG create-order call has not yet succeeded). Populated once GxG accepts the order. Callers that dereference this must be scoped to paths where the order is known to be placed (e.g. GxG webhook handlers).

recipientName.title: Recipientname
recipientName.description: The name of the recipient of the order

addressLine1.title: Addressline1
addressLine1.description: The first line of the recipient's address

addressLine2.title: Addressline2
addressLine2.description: The second line of the recipient's address

city.title: City
city.description: The city of the recipient's address

state.title: State
state.description: The state of the recipient's address

zipCode.title: Zipcode
zipCode.description: The ZIP code of the recipient's address

country.title: Country
country.description: The country of the recipient's address

phoneNumber.title: Phonenumber
phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the recipient

orderedByUserId.title: Orderedbyuserid
orderedByUserId.description: The ID of the user who initiated the order

kits.title: Kits
kits.description: The kits associated with this order

GxGWgsOrderWithKits.title: GxGWgsOrderWithKits
GxGWgsOrderWithKits.description: An order with its associated kits.

ShippingAddressOverride.title: ShippingAddressOverride
ShippingAddressOverride.description:
Caller-supplied shipping address to use instead of the patient record.

All required fields are stripped of surrounding whitespace and must be
non-empty after stripping. Callers should validate the address via the
location_service `/locations/validate` endpoint before submitting.

CmbioMbxKitStatus.title: CmbioMbxKitStatus
CmbioMbxKitStatus.description: The shipping/logistics lifecycle of the physical kit sent to the patient. Lab processing state of the returned specimen is tracked separately on CmbioMbxSample.labStatus.

cmbioMbxKitId.title: Cmbiombxkitid
cmbioMbxKitId.description: The ID of the cmbio MBX kit (generated by us)

cmbioMbxOrderId.title: Cmbiombxorderid
cmbioMbxOrderId.description: The ID of the order this kit belongs to

accountId.title: Accountid
accountId.description: The ID of the account that the kit belongs to

patientId.title: Patientid
patientId.description: The ID of the patient the kit is assigned to. May be None until the kit is linked to a patient

barcode.title: Barcode
barcode.description: The barcode printed on the physical kit. Used to link the kit to a patient

status.description: The shipping status of the kit

outboundCarrier.title: Outboundcarrier
outboundCarrier.description: The carrier for the outbound shipment to the patient

outboundTrackingNumber.title: Outboundtrackingnumber
outboundTrackingNumber.description: The tracking number for the outbound shipment to the patient

inboundCarrier.title: Inboundcarrier
inboundCarrier.description: The carrier for the inbound (return) shipment to the lab

inboundTrackingNumber.title: Inboundtrackingnumber
inboundTrackingNumber.description: The tracking number for the inbound (return) shipment to the lab

CmbioMbxKit.title: CmbioMbxKit
CmbioMbxKit.description: A physical kit shipped to a patient. The specimen collected into the kit and returned to the lab is represented by CmbioMbxSample.

barcode.title: Barcode
barcode.description: The barcode printed on the physical kit

kits.title: Kits
kits.description: The kits associated with this order

CmbioMbxOrderWithKits.title: CmbioMbxOrderWithKits
CmbioMbxOrderWithKits.description: An order with its associated kits.
